negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_07030deb-fdc3-4ca8-8d59-eb97eea8437e
prompt: A close-up shot of two glass jars filled with roasted chickpeas and a single bulb of garlic placed beside them. The jars, prominently featured in the foreground, are slightly overfilled past the brim with golden-brown roasted chickpeas, each featuring a slightly textured appearance. The peas display a range of tones from light to darker hues of brown. The jars have threading defining their finish. The subjects are placed on a brown, wooden textured surface. In the foreground on the left-hand side is a jar of chickpeas, on the right-hand side is a bulb of garlic with two visibly detached cloves; one of which is prominent within the shot, with its basal plate facing the camera and the second clove is only barely in the frame. In the background is the second jar, slightly centered between the two foreground subjects. The bulb of garlic shows its papery, pale pink outer layer. Its natural texture contrasts with the smooth surface of the transparent containers and the wooden surface. Throughout the video, the camera moves in a pedestal-up motion, capturing the scene from a close-up perspective that emphasizes the contents of the jars and places them in sharp focus against the less-detailed out-of-focus background. At the beginning of the clip, the focus is placed on the foreground jar and garlic clove. As the camera smoothly moves up, the focus changes to the rim and the contents of the container in the back. The background is blurred and indiscernible, with its light, warm colors creating a static backdrop that highlights the subjects. The scene is well-lit, and the warm ambient lighting enhances the golden colors of the chickpeas and the subtle pinks of the garlic. Light reflections are visible on the right side of the jar in the front as well as on the rim of the one in the back. No movement is observable throughout the scene, the camera is the only dynamic element.
